user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate KIT_A2G_TC387_5V_TFT 3-phase inverter PWM from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to IfxGtm_Pwm on TC387
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate three complementary, center-aligned 10 kHz PWM phase legs (U/V/W) on TOM0 TGC0 channels 0..5, active-high with 500 ns dead-time. Start duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75% and every 500 ms step each by +10% with wrap 0..100%, applying all six updates atomically via TGC gating.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use unified IfxGtm_Pwm on TOM submodule with IfxGtm_Tom_Timer as the shared timebase and update gate. Configure TOM0_CH0..CH5 as three complementary pairs, use IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout for pins P02.0..P02.5, enable GTM and CMU clocks, set 10 kHz center-aligned period on TOM0_CH7 timebase, set active-high polarity and 500 ns dead-time via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDeadTimeImmediate, and enforce atomic updates using IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate / IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate. Schedule 500 ms stepping with IfxStm_Timer.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level GTM PWM driver supports multi-channel synchronized PWM, complementary pairs, dead-time, and center-aligned operation on TC3xx; aligns with migration away from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Atomically latch new duties for all six channels every 500 ms (U/V/W with complementary outputs), preserving center alignment and dead-time.

api_changes: Use IfxGtm_Pwm_initConfig / IfxGtm_Pwm_initChannelConfig / IfxGtm_Pwm_init instead of IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl_initConfig / init
Use IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDutyImmediate to write duty per channel; dead-time via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDeadTimeImmediate
Keep atomic updates with IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate / IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate unchanged

Clock setup: IfxGtm_Cmu_setGclkFrequency / IfxGtm_Cmu_setClkFrequency are not available in this template; enable GTM and CMU clocks with IfxGtm_enable and IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks and use existing clock configuration
migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution retains TOM-based 3-phase complementary PWM at 10 kHz, center-aligned, active-high with 500 ns dead-time. Atomic multi-channel updates are guaranteed using the same TGC (TOM0 TGC0) and IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_disableUpdate/applyUpdate. Initial duties and 500 ms duty stepping behavior are implemented while using the unified IfxGtm_Pwm driver as requested.
